title: Regression Test Suite Migration
summary: Migrate end-to-end regression tests from Cypress to Playwright across all product modules.

items.text: All existing Cypress test scenarios have an equivalent Playwright test
CI pipeline runs Playwright suite and reports results to GitHub Checks
Playwright tests pass consistently across Chrome, Firefox, and WebKit
Test execution time does not exceed current Cypress runtime by more than 20%
Flaky test detection and auto-retry is configured for all new Playwright tests
Audit existing Cypress test suite and catalog all test scenarios
Set up Playwright project with TypeScript, ESLint, and Prettier
Migrate authentication and session tests (12 scenarios)
Migrate checkout flow tests (8 scenarios)
Migrate search and browse tests (15 scenarios)
Update CI pipeline to run Playwright and remove Cypress step
Run full regression suite in staging for 5 consecutive days before cutover
Playwright may not support certain Cypress-specific plugins (cy.route, cy.intercept patterns)
items.impact: Some tests may need redesign or alternative approaches
items.mitigation: Audit plugin usage before migration begins; prototype alternatives early

items.text: Flaky E2E tests could erode team confidence in the new suite
items.impact: Teams may push back on Playwright adoption
items.mitigation: Configure Playwright flaky test detection with 3x auto-retry; track flake rate in dashboard

items.text: Test execution time could regress due to Playwright's multi-browser matrix
items.impact: CI pipeline duration increases, blocking developer velocity
items.mitigation: Run browsers in parallel via Playwright sharding; set a hard 10-minute CI limit

items.text: Team lacks Playwright expertise initially
items.mitigation: Pair a senior QA engineer on first 3 migration sprints; schedule workshop

items.text: All current test environments are compatible with Playwright browser binaries
The team can maintain both test suites during a 2-week parallel run period
No major application architecture changes are planned during the migration window
Playwright's request interception API covers all existing mock scenarios
e2e/playwright/ (new directory)
e2e/cypress/ (remove after migration)
.github/workflows/e2e.yml
playwright.config.ts
docs/testing/regression-checklist.md
Playwright's codegen tool (`npx playwright codegen`) should be used to accelerate initial test scaffolding.
Create a shared test fixture factory to reduce duplication across migrated scenarios.
Flag any test that requires visual regression comparison — those may need percy.io or Playwright's built-in snapshot.
